notes:
Test new BTR graphite for comparison against MSE graphite.

notes:
Testing of Jong's recipe with newly received AST-9005(26)
Lot's of cracking and agglomerates visualized under microscope.

metadata_json.purpose_summary: Testing of Jong's recipe with newly received AST-9005(26)
metadata_json.hypothesis: Binder grade and agglomeration-control steps should determine whether the recipe coats cleanly without cracking.
metadata_json.result_takeaway: Lot's of cracking and agglomerates visualized under microscope.

notes: Testing of Jong's recipe with newly received AST-9005(30). Update mixing to match Brian's style.

metadata_json.hypothesis: Binder grade and agglomeration-control steps should determine whether the recipe coats cleanly without cracking.

notes:
Testing of Jong's recipe with newly received AST-9005(26). Prepare a bigger batch and test methods such as filtering for agglomerate removal.
Best electrode quality so far. Pre-dispersion in water, pre-sifting and Small Zr beads seemed to help.

metadata_json.purpose_summary: Testing of Jong's recipe with newly received AST-9005(26). Prepare a bigger batch and test methods such as filtering for agglomerate removal.
metadata_json.hypothesis: Binder grade and agglomeration-control steps should determine whether the recipe coats cleanly without cracking.
metadata_json.result_takeaway: Best electrode quality so far. Pre-dispersion in water, pre-sifting and Small Zr beads seemed to help.

notes:
Testing of Jong's recipe with newly received AST-9005(30). Prepare a bigger batch and test methods such as 2mm Zr beads for agglomeration control.
Electrode quality was more grainy than T37. Possibly the LiPAA, but mixing procedure was less strict. Will repeat with slower addition of dry materials to solvents.

metadata_json.purpose_summary: Testing of Jong's recipe with newly received AST-9005(30). Prepare a bigger batch and test methods such as 2mm Zr beads for agglomeration control.
metadata_json.hypothesis: Binder grade and agglomeration-control steps should determine whether the recipe coats cleanly without cracking.
metadata_json.result_takeaway: Electrode quality was more grainy than T37. Possibly the LiPAA, but mixing procedure was less strict. Will repeat with slower addition of dry materials to solvents.

notes: Testing of Jong's recipe with half AST-9005(30), half (26). Prepare a bigger batch and test methods such as 2mm Zr beads for agglomeration control.

metadata_json.purpose_summary: Testing of Jong's recipe with half AST-9005(30), half (26). Prepare a bigger batch and test methods such as 2mm Zr beads for agglomeration control.
metadata_json.hypothesis: Binder grade and agglomeration-control steps should determine whether the recipe coats cleanly without cracking.

notes:
Comparison of Super P vs Cx-B as a conductive additive.
Cells did not cycle well or yield reliable data. Will repeat this experiment with standardized materials. Li chips, pressing of electrodes etc.

metadata_json.purpose_summary: Comparison of Super P vs Cx-B as a conductive additive.
metadata_json.hypothesis: The conductive additive choice should materially affect electrode quality and performance.
metadata_json.result_takeaway: Cells did not cycle well or yield reliable data. Will repeat this experiment with standardized materials. Li chips, pressing of electrodes etc.
